recommendations.title: Monster
recommendations.overview: The story of Steve Harmon, a 17-year-old honor student whose world comes crashing down around him when he is charged with felony murder.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Two Girls and a Guy
recommendations.overview: Two women confront their boyfriend, a two-timing actor who professed eternal love to each.

recommendations.title: Not Suitable For Children
recommendations.overview: A young playboy who learns he has one month until he becomes infertile sets out to procreate as much as possible.

recommendations.title: To Be or Not to Be
recommendations.overview: A bad Polish actor is just trying to make a living when Poland is invaded by the Germans in World War II. His wife has the habit of entertaining young Polish officers while he's on stage, which is also a source of depression to him. When one of her o

recommendations.title: Nothing in Common
recommendations.overview: A successful advertising executive finds his freewheeling life crashing to a halt when his parents end their longtime marriage.

recommendations.title: Secret Admirer
recommendations.overview: An anonymous love letter left in Michael Ryan's locker on the last day of school wreaks havoc on his life and the lives of everyone who comes in contact with it.

recommendations.title: El man del porno
recommendations.overview: When Carlos Andrés decides that the best way to contribute to his family is to become a porn actor, the only problem is that his girlfriend does not know about his successful career.

recommendations.title: Theatre of Blood
recommendations.overview: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition.
